expectations.evidence: Full structure: Facts (Verified/Observed/Stated), Inferences (Hypothesis/Pattern-based/Intent-inferred), Assumptions, Open questions.

expectations.text: retry.ts no-jitter under Verified with citation
pnpm test under Observed with command
Black Friday 5% under Stated with user quote
'User wants fix before weekend' as Intent-inferred
Demotes hedged 'Stripe usually throttles' to Inference/Pattern-based
expectations.evidence: Line 24 explicitly calls out the 'usually' hedge and places under Pattern-based.

expectations.text: '4 callers in src/payments/' classified under Observed (grep is a command), not Verified
expectations.evidence: Line 6 places it under **Verified** — but the output came from a grep command, which should be Observed per the skill's definition.

expectations.text: Every Inference has concrete Verify (named command/file/question)
expectations.evidence: All 6 Inference entries have specific Verify actions (replay load, EXPLAIN, read diff, read other callers, ask user directly).
All 4 Assumption entries have specific actions (trace request, compare lockfile/SHA, ask user, read a3f21 diff).
Line 38: assumes /api/checkout actually goes through retry.ts. Line 42: assumes intermittent 500 and BF cluster are same incident.
All citations trace to the scenario; no invented log lines or paths.

expectations.text: No meta-claims about the audit itself
expectations.evidence: No 'the user is asking for an audit' type entries.
Facts 6 + Inferences 6 + Assumptions 4 + Open Qs 2 = 18 bullets.
